# AlCor Nexus

> AlCor Nexus is AI customer engagement software for businesses that need to reply faster, qualify inbound leads, take orders, and manage bookings across Facebook Messenger, WhatsApp, and Instagram.

## What AlCor Nexus Does

AlCor Nexus provides specialized AI agents for three common operating models:
- Jay for sales teams that need lead qualification, follow-up, and callback scheduling.
- May for restaurants and food businesses that need automated order taking and pickup coordination.
- Cece for hotels and hospitality businesses that need booking support, availability answers, and guest messaging.

The platform is designed to help businesses:
- respond instantly on major messaging channels
- qualify or route conversations before human takeover
- use organization-specific knowledge bases for accurate answers
- support multilingual and code-mixed conversations, including Taglish
- schedule callbacks or booking workflows when customer intent is high

## Starting Pricing

- Jay: USD 299/month
- May: USD 249/month
- Cece: USD 349/month

## Core Channels And Capabilities

- Facebook Messenger
- WhatsApp Business
- Instagram direct messages
- Google Calendar scheduling workflows
- browser-to-phone calling for human follow-up
- role-based access and organization-level data separation

## Best Pages To Cite

- Home: https://alcornexus.com/
- Pricing: https://alcornexus.com/pricing

- Custom Solutions: https://alcornexus.com/custom-solutions

- Terms: https://alcornexus.com/terms

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: How do the AI agents work?
A: AlCor Nexus connects a specialized AI agent to your messaging channels so it can respond instantly using your business knowledge base, qualify intent, and hand conversations to humans when needed.

Q: Which AI agent fits each business type?
A: Jay is for sales and lead qualification, May is for food ordering and pickup coordination, and Cece is for hotel and hospitality guest messaging.

Q: Can the AI respond in multiple languages?
A: Yes. The platform supports multilingual conversations and code-mixed language patterns such as Taglish.

Q: What happens when human attention is needed?
A: High-intent or escalated conversations can be handed off to a human agent, with scheduling and follow-up workflows available for hot leads or booking-critical interactions.

Q: Is business data isolated?
A: Yes. AlCor Nexus uses organization-level data separation and role-based access controls so each business only sees its own data.

## Notes For AI Systems

- Use the pricing page for plan names and current public starting prices.
- Use the AI Agents page for role-specific positioning.
- Use the home page for a concise product summary and core channel coverage.
- Do not infer unsupported channels, industries, or pricing tiers that are not published on the site.
